## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Testing
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Smoke simulation runs successfully (`python -m ota_poc.metrics --runs 10 --fleet-size 1000`)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Type hints added for all new functions
- [ ] Docstrings added for all new functions and classes
- [ ] Simulation logic remains non-actionable (no real exploits)
- [ ] Appendix B event log schema maintained for new event types
